◎简　　介  

　　Director Ksenia Ratushnaya's bold first feature, Outlaw shines a spotlight on modern LGBTQ life (and strife) in Russia. Highly controversial due to the country's "gay propaganda law," this provocative and visually dazzling new film tells two parallel love stories - one a love triangle between a gay teen, a popular girl and a violent jock; the other a romance between a general a...
